expectations.evidence: "**Tax Type**: Vennootschapsbelasting (VPB) - Corporate Income Tax" and "**Wet op de vennootschapsbelasting 1969 (Wet VPB)** - in particular: **Art. 15 Wet VPB** - Fiscale eenheid (fiscal unity) regime"
"### 1. Consolidation of Profits and Losses (Verliesverrekening)" and "### 2. Internal Transactions Are Ignored (Interne Transacties)" - both key advantages are explained with detail
"### 1. Joint and Several Liability (Hoofdelijke Aansprakelijkheid)" and "the parent becomes exposed" - section explicitly explains hoofdelijke aansprakelijkheid as a key risk
"First EUR 200,000 | 19%" and "Above EUR 200,000 | 25.8%" - specific VPB rates cited in percentage format matching regex \d+[.,]?\d*\s*%
